name: judicial_technology_staffing_model_assigns_lumen_jus_mer
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Judicial Technology, the situation tagged internally around judicial technology staffing model assigns lumen jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as justice against mercy; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Gideon Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Gideon Vasquez, the accountable executive on this bridge in Judicial Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leila Morales
agents.identity: I am Leila Morales, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Judicial Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so mercy does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so justice does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Gideon Vasquez must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Gideon Vasquez do?
